notes: ScrapLink 0.22.0 adds NOVA as a fully independent companion alongside Scrap and Vantrel.
NOVA includes 100 animation clips, 38 facial controls, and a dedicated veteran personality and memory profile.
Hosted voice keeps AI speech off the gaming PC, while frame rendering remains lightweight and uses no GPU compute context.
Ghost Mode, player memory, screen awareness, and the early friends hub remain included for invited testers.
